objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 school words, Present Simple vs Present Continuous, listening, speaking, homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. Сургуулийн 20 шинэ үг, Present Simple ба Present Continuous-ын ялгаа, сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Today you learn 20 school and study words and master the difference between Present Simple (habits) and Present Continuous (right now).
contentMn: Өнөөдөр сургуулийн 20 шинэ үг сурч, Present Simple (дадал) ба Present Continuous (яг одоо)-ын ялгааг эзэмшинэ.

vocabulary.example: I do my homework every day.
My exam result is very good.
She is very good at art.
I use a dictionary every day.
I learn something new every day.

quiz.question: Which signal word goes with Present Simple?
Which signal word goes with Present Continuous?
quiz.explanation: Right now = this moment = Present Continuous.

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence: She _____ her homework now.
He always _____ to school by bus.
quiz.explanation: 'Always' = habit → Present Simple, 3rd person singular adds -es.

quiz.question: Which verb CANNOT use the -ing form?
quiz.explanation: Stative verbs like understand/know/like never take -ing.

quiz.question: Choose the correct question: _____ you understand?
quiz.explanation: Understand is stative; use Present Simple → Do you understand?

quiz.question: What does Bat usually do after school?
quiz.explanation: From the listening: Bat usually studies English and does homework.

quiz.question: What is Bat doing right now?
quiz.explanation: He says: 'Right now I am listening to you and taking notes.'

quiz.question: I _____ the answer! (verb 'know')
quiz.explanation: Know is a stative verb — never -ing.

quiz.question: Negative form of 'I study on Sundays': I _____ on Sundays.
quiz.explanation: Present Simple negative for 'I' = don't + base verb.

page1.grammarTopic: Present Simple vs Present Continuous — key differences
page1.grammarExplanation: Present Simple = HABITS and ROUTINES (every day, always, usually). Present Continuous = what is happening RIGHT NOW (now, at the moment, look!). Some verbs (know, like, love, want, understand, remember, forget, need, have) NEVER use the continuous form. / Present Simple = ДАДАЛ ЗУРШИЛ (өдөр бүр болдог зүйл). Present Continuous = ЯГ ОДОО болж буй зүйл. Зарим үйл үгс (know, like, love, want, understand, need) Continuous хэлбэрийг хэзээ ч хэрэглэдэггүй.

grammarTable.subject: Usually
grammarTable.question: Does he usually go by bus?

quickPractice: He always _____ to school by bus. (go — habit)
He usually _____ to school by bus. (go — habit)
commonMistakes: I am study every day. → I study every day. (habit → Simple)
I study now. → I AM studying now. (now → Continuous)
She is knowing the answer. → She knows the answer.
Are you understand? → Do you understand?

page2.readingPassage: Bat loves school. He usually studies English for one hour every evening. But today is different! Right now, it is 3 PM and he is studying with his friend Sarnai in the library. They have an exam tomorrow. Sarnai usually reads at home, but today she is reading at the library. They both work hard because English is very important for their future!

keyPhrases.english: She is reading at the library

speakingQuestions: What do you usually study after school?
What are you studying right now?
What subjects do you like? / Та ямар хичээлд дуртай вэ?
Are you studying English every day?
What do you usually do in the library?

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What do you usually do after school?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I usually study English for an hour.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What are you doing right now?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I am doing my homework for tomorrow.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I understand most of it, but not all.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What are you studying at the moment?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I am reviewing my vocabulary words now.

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Teacher: Today we compare Present Simple and Continuous. Bat, what do you usually do after school? Bat: I usually study English and do my homework. Teacher: Good! And what are you doing right now? Bat: Right now I am listening to you and taking notes! Teacher: Perfect! Sarnai, do you study English every day? Sarnai: Yes, I study English every day. Right now I am also studying grammar. Teacher: Do you understand the difference between Simple and Continuous? Students: Yes! Simple = every day. Continuous = right now!

listeningQuestions.question: What does Bat usually do after school?
What is Bat doing right now?
Does Sarnai study English every day?
What is Sarnai doing right now?
Which signal word goes with Present Simple?
Which signal word goes with Present Continuous?
Do the students understand the difference?
What do students say at the end?

grammarPractice: He always _____ to school by bus. (go)
homework: Writing: Write 4 sentences with Present Simple (every day) and 4 with Continuous (now).
Vocabulary: Write your school subjects in English and say which you like / don't like.
Speaking: Tell someone: 'I usually... but right now I am...'
Review: Key rule: Every day = Simple · Right now = Continuous · know/like/love = NEVER -ing
completionSummary: Mastered Present Simple vs Present Continuous
Read about studying at the library
Learned which verbs never take -ing form
